## What kind of PR is this?

- [ ] ➕ New listing(s)
- [ ] ✏️ Update/correction to an existing listing
- [ ] 📦 Archive a closed listing
- [ ] 🛠 Code / docs / automation

## Checklist

- [ ] I edited JSON under `data/` (not `README.md` or `generated/` — those are machine-owned)
- [ ] `internatlas validate` passes locally (or I'll let CI check)
- [ ] Information comes from the official posting / careers page
- [ ] No non-public personal contact info included

## Source

Link to the official posting or announcement:
